name: @platform/atlas-artifact
description: Verify-only WASM bindings over the ke-artifact verification surface (spec § 6, § 14; ADR 0016). Verifies a .kew artifact in the browser; cannot sign, attest, or publish.
comment: pkg/ is generated by wasm-pack (build script) and is NOT committed source. Tooling pin: the wasm-bindgen crate is =0.2.95; install wasm-bindgen-cli --version 0.2.95 so the CLI matches the crate exactly. WASM is verify-only (spec § 6).
